name: Freelance / Independent Contractor Agreement
description: A contract between a freelancer and a client establishing the terms, scope, and compensation for a project or fixed period.
content:
INDEPENDENT CONTRACTOR AGREEMENT

This Independent Contractor Agreement (the "Agreement") is entered into as of {{formatDate signature_date}} by and between {{client_name}} ("Client") and {{freelancer_name}} ("Contractor/Freelancer").

1. THE PARTIES

A. CLIENT
Company/Name: {{client_name}}
Address: {{client_address}}
Contact Person: {{client_contact}}
Email: {{client_email}}

B. CONTRACTOR (Freelancer)
Name: {{freelancer_name}}
Address: {{freelancer_address}}
Phone: {{freelancer_phone}}
Email: {{freelancer_email}}
{{#if freelancer_tax_id}}Tax ID / SSN: {{freelancer_tax_id}}{{/if}}

2. SERVICES TO BE PROVIDED

The Contractor agrees to perform the following services (the "Services") for the Client:

{{job_description}}

Deliverables:

{{deliverables_list}}

3. TERM AND SCHEDULE

{{#if (eq duration_type 'Project Based')}}

This Agreement shall be effective until the completion of the Services.
Start Date: {{formatDate start_date}}
Estimated Delivery Date: {{formatDate delivery_date}}

{{else}}

This Agreement is for a fixed term, commencing on {{formatDate start_date}} and terminating on {{formatDate end_date}}.

{{/if}} {{#if milestones}}

Project Milestones / Interim Deadlines:

{{milestones}}
{{/if}}

4. COMPENSATION AND PAYMENT

The Client agrees to pay the Contractor {{total_compensation}} on a {{payment_type}} basis.

Payment Schedule:

{{payment_schedule}}

Payment Method: {{payment_method}}

5. INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY RIGHTS

{{#if (eq ip_rights 'Assigned to Client')}}

Work Made for Hire: All work product, designs, code, and deliverables created by the Contractor under this Agreement shall be considered "work made for hire." Upon full payment, the Client shall own all rights, title, and interest, including copyrights, in the deliverables.

{{else}}

License Granted to Client: The Contractor retains all intellectual property rights to the deliverables. Upon full payment, the Contractor grants the Client a {{license_scope}} license to use the deliverables.

{{/if}}

The Contractor warrants that all deliverables are original and do not infringe upon the intellectual property rights of any third party.

6. CONFIDENTIALITY

The Contractor agrees to keep all Client information, data, and materials strictly confidential and shall not disclose them to any third party without prior written consent.

7. INDEPENDENT CONTRACTOR STATUS

The Contractor is an independent contractor. Nothing contained in this Agreement shall be construed to create an employer-employee, partnership, or joint venture relationship. The Contractor is solely responsible for paying all applicable taxes.

8. TERMINATION

Either party may terminate this Agreement under the following conditions: {{termination_conditions}}.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the Parties have executed this Agreement as of the date first written above.

CLIENT
{{client_name}}

Signature: _________________________

CONTRACTOR
{{freelancer_name}}

Signature: _________________________

fields.name: deliverables_list
fields.label: List of Deliverables
fields.placeholder: e.g., Vector logo files, Source code, Final Report...

fields.name: termination_conditions
fields.label: Termination Conditions
fields.placeholder: e.g., By either party with 14 days written notice.
